Off Calendar Jul-16-2007 Set For Trial On Jan-22-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jan-03-08 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 611

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jul-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Joyce Jordan, Esq., appearing for plaintiff & moving party: Valentina Wallace
No other appearance.

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs Valentina Wallace, Gregory Wallace's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories; Requests For Production; And Requests For Admissions; And For Order Establishing Admissions is granted as it seeks an order compelling responses to form interrogatories and requests for production of documents propounded by Plaintiffs Gregory Wallace and Valentina Wallace to Defendants Betty Lee and Charles Quong Sim Lee. The requests for admissions propounded by Plaintiffs Gregory Wallace and Valentina Wallace to Defendants Betty Lee and Charles Quong Sim Lee are deemed admitted. No opposition has been filed. Defendants' failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiffs Gregory Wallace and Valentina Wallace, jointly and severally, in the amount of $540, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
